    Module mathcomp.classical.cardinality

    From HB Require Import structures.
    From mathcomp Require Import all_ssreflect_compat finmap ssralg ssrnum ssrint rat.
    From mathcomp Require Import mathcomp_extra boolp classical_sets functions.

    # Cardinality This file provides an account of cardinality properties of classical sets. This includes standard results of set theory such as the Pigeon Hole principle, the Cantor-Bernstein Theorem, or lemmas about the cardinal of nat, nat * nat, and rat. Since universe polymorphism is not yet available in our framework, we develop a relational theory of cardinals: there is no type for cardinals only relations A #<= B and A #= B to compare the cardinals of two sets (on two possibly different types). ``` A #<= B == the cardinal of A is smaller or equal to the one of B A #>= B := B #<= A A #= B == the cardinal of A is equal to the cardinal of B A #!= B := ~~ (A #= B) finite_set A == the set A is finite := exists n, A #= `I_n <-> exists X : {fset T}, A = [set` X] <-> ~ ([set: nat] #<= A) infinite_set A := ~ finite_set A cofinite_set A := finite_set (~` A) countable A <-> A is countable := A #<= [set: nat] fset_set A == the finite set corresponding if A : set T is finite, set0 otherwise (T : choiceType) A.`1 := [fset x.1 | x in A] A.`2 := [fset x.2 | x in A] {fimfun aT >-> T} == type of functions with a finite image ```

    Unset SsrOldRewriteGoalsOrder.
    Set Implicit Arguments.
    Unset Strict Implicit.
    Unset Printing Implicit Defensive.

    Reserved Notation "A '#<=' B" (at level 79, format "A '#<=' B").
    Reserved Notation "A '#>=' B" (at level 79, format "A '#>=' B").
    Reserved Notation "A '#=' B" (at level 79, format "A '#=' B").
    Reserved Notation "A '#!=' B" (at level 79, format "A '#!=' B").

    Import Order.Theory GRing.Theory.

    Local Open Scope classical_set_scope.
    Local Open Scope ring_scope.
    Local Open Scope function_scope.

    Declare Scope card_scope.
    Delimit Scope card_scope with card.
    Local Open Scope card_scope.

    "A '#<=' B"

    Notation

    Definition
    card_eq

    Internals.sumor_wType : forall [P : Prop] (Q : Prop), Internals.witnessedType P -> Internals.properWitnessedType (P \/ Q) Internals.sumor_wType is not universe polymorphic Arguments Internals.sumor_wType [P]%_type_scope Q%_type_scope T Internals.sumor_wType is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.contra.Internals.sumor_wType Declared in library mathcomp.classical.contra, line 610, characters 10-21

    "A '#=' B"

     := (card_eq A B) : card_scope.
    Notation
    "A '#!=' B"
    Source code
     := (~~ (card_eq A B)) : card_scope.

    Definition

    , B = f @` A.

    Lemma
    card_le0P
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : reflect (A = set0) (A #<= @set0 U).
    Proof.
    apply: (iffP idP) => [/card_leP[f]|->//].
    by rewrite -subset0 => a /mem_set aA; have [x /set_mem] := f (SigSub aA).
    Qed.

     : set T) : (A #<= @set0 U) = (A == set0).
    Proof.
    exact/card_le0P/eqP. Qed.

    Lemma
    card_eq00
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     : @set0 T #= @set0 U.
    Proof.
    apply/card_eqP/squash; apply: @bijection_of_bijective set0fun _.
    by exists set0fun => -[x x0]; have := set_mem x0.
    Qed.
    #[global] Hint Resolve card_eq00 : core.

    Definition
    emptyE_subdef

    Internals.sig2_wType : forall [T : Type] (P Q : T -> Prop), Internals.properWitnessedType (exists2 x : T, P x & Q x) Internals.sig2_wType is not universe polymorphic Arguments Internals.sig2_wType [T]%_type_scope (P Q)%_function_scope Internals.sig2_wType is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.contra.Internals.sig2_wType Declared in library mathcomp.classical.contra, line 619, characters 10-20

    Source code
     := (empty_eq0, card_le_emptyl, card_le_emptyr, eq_opE).
    End empty1.

    Theorem
    Cantor_Bernstein
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    B
    Source code
     : set U) :
      A #<= B -> B #<= A -> A #= B.
    Proof.
    elim/Ppointed: T => T in A *; first by rewrite !emptyE_subdef => _ ->.
    elim/Ppointed: U => U in B *; first by rewrite !emptyE_subdef => ->.
    suff {A B} card_eq (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set U) : B `<=` A -> A #<= B -> A #= B.
      move=> /ppcard_leP[f] /ppcard_leP[g].
      have /(_ _)/ppcard_eqP[|h] := card_eq _ _ (fun_image_sub f).
        by apply/pcard_leP; squash ([fun f in A] \o g).
      by apply/pcard_eqP; squash ((split h)^-1 \o [fun f in A]).
    move=> BA /ppcard_leP[u]; have uAB := 'funS_u.
    pose C_ := fix C
    n
    Source code
     := if n is n.+1 then u @` C n else A `\` B.
    pose C := \bigcup_
    n
    Source code
     C_ n; have CA : C `<=` A.
      by move=> + [] => /[swap]; elim=> [|i IH] y _ []// x /IH/uAB/BA + <-; apply.
    have uC: {homo u :
    x
    Source code
     / x \in C}.
      by move=> x; rewrite !inE => -[i _ Cix]; exists i.+1 => //; exists x.
    apply/card_set_bijP; exists (fun
    x
    Source code
     => if x \in C then u x else x); split.
    - move=> x Ax; case: ifPn; first by move=> _; apply: uAB.
      by move/negP; apply: contra_notP => NBx; rewrite inE; exists 0%N.
    - move=> x y xA yA; have := 'inj_u xA yA.
      have [xC|] := boolP (x \in C); have [yC|] := boolP (y \in C) => // + _.
        by move=> /[swap]<-; rewrite uC// xC.
      by move=> /[swap]->; rewrite uC// yC.
    - move=> y /[dup] By /BA Ay/=.
      case: (boolP (y \in C)); last by exists y; rewrite // ifN.
      rewrite inE => -[[|i]/= _ []// x Cix <-]; have Cx : C x by exists i.
      by exists x; [exact: CA|rewrite ifT// inE].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    card_esym
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    B
    Source code
     : set U) : A #= B -> B #= A.
    Proof.
    by move=> /card_eqVP[f]; apply/card_eqP; squash f^-1. Qed.

    Lemma
    card_eq_le
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    B
    Source code
     : set U) :
      (A #= B) = (A #<= B) && (B #<= A).
    Proof.
    apply/idP/andP => [/card_eqVP[f]|[]]; last exact: Cantor_Bernstein.
    by split; apply/card_leP; [squash f|squash f^-1].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    card_eqPle
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    B
    Source code
     : set U) :
      (A #= B) <-> (A #<= B) /\ (B #<= A).
    Proof.
    by rewrite card_eq_le (rwP andP). Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : A #<= A.

    by apply/card_leP; squash idfun. Qed.
    #[global] Hint Resolve card_lexx : core.

    Lemma
    card_leT
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    S
    Source code
     : set T) : S #<= [set: T].
    Proof.
    by apply/card_leP; squash (to_setT \o inclT _ \o val). Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_card_le
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) : A `<=` B -> A #<= B.
    Proof.
    by move=> AB; apply/card_leP; squash (inclT _ \o subfun AB). Qed.

    Lemma
    card_image_le
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
    } (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> U) (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : f @` A #<= A.
    Proof.
    elim/Ppointed: T => T in A f *; first by rewrite !emptyE_subdef image_set0.
    by apply/pcard_leP; squash (pinv A f).
    Qed.

    Lemma
    inj_card_eq
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
    } {
    A
    Source code
    } {
    f
    Source code
     : T -> U} : {in A &, injective f} -> f @` A #= A.
    Proof.
    by move=> /inj_bij/pcard_eq/card_esym. Qed.
    Arguments inj_card_eq {T U A f}.

    Lemma
    card_some
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    A
    Source code
     : set T} : some @` A #= A.
    Proof.
    exact: inj_card_eq. Qed.

    card_image

    Source code
    U
    Source code
    } {
    A
    Source code

    Source code
     {

    Source code
     : pointedType} {

    Lemma
    card_le_II
    Source code
    n
    Source code
    m
    Source code
     : (`I_n #<= `I_m) = (n <= m)%N.
    Proof.
    apply/idP/idP=> [/card_leP[f]|?];
      last by apply/subset_card_le => k /leq_trans; apply.
    by have /leq_card := in2TT 'inj_(IIord \o f \o IIord^-1); rewrite !card_ord.
    Qed.

     {

    Source code
    U
    Source code
    } {
    A
    Source code

    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
    } {
    A
    Source code
     : set T} {

    exact: (iffP ppcard_eqP).
    Qed.

    C
    Source code

    Lemma
    finite_fsetP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} {
    A
    Source code
     : set T} :
      finite_set A <-> exists
    X
    Source code
     : {fset T}, A = [set` X].

      exists #|{: X}|; rewrite (card_eqr card_II).
      by apply/card_eqP; squash (to_setT \o enum_rank \o val_finset).

    exists [fset val (g i) |
    i

     in 'I_n]%fset.

    by apply/imfsetP; exists (g^-1 (SigSub Ax)); rewrite ?[g _]invK//= inE.
    Qed.

    Source code
    } (
    A

     : set T) : infinite_set A -> A !=set0.

    Lemma

    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : eqType}
    A
    Source code
     :
       finite_set A <-> exists
    s
    Source code
     : seq T, A = [set` s].

    split=> [[X ->]|[s ->]]; first by exists X.
    by exists [fset x |
    x
    Source code
     in s]%fset; apply/seteqP; split=> x /=; rewrite inE.
    Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : eqType} (
    s
    Source code
     : seq T) : finite_set [set` s].

    Lemma

    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} (
    X

    Lemma
    finite_finpred
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : finType} {
    pT
    Source code
     : predType T} (
    P
    Source code
     : pT) :
      finite_set [set` P].
    Proof.
    rewrite finite_seqP; exists (enum P).
    by apply/seteqP; split=> x/=; rewrite mem_enum.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    infiniteP
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : infinite_set A <-> [set: nat] #<= A.
    Proof.
    elim/Ppointed: T => T in A *.
      by rewrite !emptyE; split=> // /(congr1 (@^~ 0%N))/=; rewrite propeqE => -[].
    split=> [Ainfinite| + /finite_setP[n eqAI]]; last first.
      rewrite (card_le_eqr eqAI) => le_nat_n.
      suff: `I_n.+1 #<= `I_n by rewrite card_le_II ltnn.
      exact: card_le_trans (subset_card_le _) le_nat_n.
    have /all_sig2[f Af fX] : forall
    X
    Source code
     : {fset T}, {
    x
    Source code
     | x \in A & x \notin X}.
      move=> X; apply/sig2W; apply: contra_notP Ainfinite => nAX; apply/finite_fsetP.
      exists [fset
    x
    Source code
     in X | x \in A]%fset; rewrite eqEsubset; split; last first.
        by move=> x/=; rewrite !inE => /andP[_]; rewrite inE.
      move=> x Ax /=; rewrite !inE/=; apply/andP; split; rewrite ?inE//.
      by apply: contra_notT nAX => xNX; exists x; rewrite ?inE.
    do [under [forall
    x
    Source code
     : {fset _}, _]eq_forall do rewrite inE] in Af *.
    suff [g gE] : exists
    g
    Source code
     : nat -> T,
        forall
    n
    Source code
    , g n = f [fset g k |
    k
    Source code
     in iota 0 n]%fset.
      have /Pinj[h hE] : {in setT &, injective g}.
        move=> i j _ _; apply: contra_eq; wlog lt_ij : i j / (i < j)%N => [hwlog|_].
        by case: ltngtP => // ij _; [|rewrite eq_sym];
           apply: hwlog=> //; rewrite lt_eqF//.
        rewrite [g j]gE; set X := (X in f X); have := fX X.
        by apply: contraNneq => <-; apply/imfsetP; exists i => //=; rewrite mem_iota.
      have/injPfun[i _] : {homo h :
    x
    Source code
     / setT x >-> A x} by move=> i; rewrite -hE gE.
      by apply/pcard_leP; squash i.
    pose g := fix g
    n
    Source code
    k
    Source code
     := if n isn't n'.+1 then f fset0
                           else f [fset g n' i |
    i
    Source code
     in iota 0 k]%fset.
    exists (fun
    n
    Source code
     => g n n) => n.
    suff {n} gn n k : (k <= n)%N -> g n k = f [fset g k k |
    k
    Source code
     in iota 0 k]%fset.
      by rewrite gn//; congr f; apply/fsetP => k.
    have [m] := ubnP n; elim: m n k => //= m IHm [|n] k /=.
      rewrite leqn0 => _ /eqP->/=.
      congr f; apply/fsetP => x; rewrite !inE; symmetry.
      by apply/imfsetP => /= -[].
    rewrite ltnS => ltmn lekSn /=; congr f; apply/fsetP => i.
    by apply/imfsetP/imfsetP => /= -[j]; rewrite mem_iota/= => jk ->;
       exists j; rewrite ?mem_iota//= ?add0n ?IHm//;
       by [rewrite (leq_trans jk)// (leq_trans lekSn)|rewrite -ltnS (leq_trans jk)].
    Qed.

    Lemma

     (

    , A #<= `I_n.

    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
    } (
    B
    Source code
     : set U) (
    f
    Source code

    Lemma
    finite_setX_or
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    T'
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    B
    Source code
     : set T') :
      finite_set (A `*` B) -> finite_set A \/ finite_set B.
    Proof.
    have [->|/set0P[a Aa]] := eqVneq A set0; first by left.
    have /sub_finite_set : [set a] `*` B `<=` A `*` B by move=> x/= [] -> ?; split.
    move => /[apply]/(finite_image snd); rewrite (_ : _ @` _ = B); last by right.
    by apply/seteqP; split=> [b [[? ?] [? ?] <-//]|b ?]/=; exists (a, b).
    Qed.

     (

     (
    A

    B

    T

     (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) :
      cofinite_set A \/ cofinite_set B -> cofinite_set (A `|` B).

    Lemma
    finite_setU
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) :
      finite_set (A `|` B) = (finite_set A /\ finite_set B).
    Proof.
    pose fP := @finite_fsetP {classic T}; rewrite propeqE; split.
      by move=> finAUB; split; apply: sub_finite_set finAUB.
    by case=> /fP[X->]/fP[Y->]; apply/fP; exists (X `|` Y)%fset; rewrite set_fsetU.
    Qed.

     (

    B

    Lemma
    finite_setX
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    T'
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    B
    Source code
     : set T') :
      finite_set A -> finite_set B -> finite_set (A `*` B).
    Proof.
    elim/Pchoice: T => T in A *; elim/Pchoice: T' => T' in B *.
    move=> /finite_fsetP[{}A ->] /finite_fsetP[{}B ->].
    apply/finite_fsetP; exists (A `*` B)%fset; apply/predeqP => x.
    by split; rewrite /= inE => /andP.
    Qed.

     [
    aT

    bT

     : Type] [
    A
    Source code
     : set aT] [

    Lemma

    Source code
     [
    xT
    Source code
    aT
    Source code
    bT
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
     : Type] [
    X
    Source code
     : set xT]
        (
    g
    Source code
     : aT -> bT -> rT) (
    fa
    Source code
     : xT -> aT) (
    fb

     : xT -> bT) :

    by move=> r/= [x Xx <-]; exists (fa x, fb x) => //; split; exists x.

    Definition
    fset_set

    Internals.witness : forall {T : Type} {P0 : Prop} {P : Internals.witnessProp false P0 T}, Internals.move_view (Internals.unwrap_Prop (Internals.witness_Prop P)) T Internals.witness is not universe polymorphic Arguments Internals.witness {T P0}%_type_scope {P} Internals.witness is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.contra.Internals.witness Declared in library mathcomp.classical.contra, line 691, characters 11-18

    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType) (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) :=
      if pselect (finite_set A) is left Afin
      then projT1 (cid (finite_fsetP.1 Afin)) else fset0.

    Lemma
    fset_setK
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType) (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : finite_set A ->
      [set` fset_set A] = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite /fset_set; case: pselect => // Afin _; case: cid. Qed.

    Lemma
    in_fset_set
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType) (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : finite_set A ->
      fset_set A =i A.
    Proof.
    by move=> fA x; rewrite -[A in RHS]fset_setK//; apply/idP/idP; rewrite ?inE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_set_sub
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType) (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) :
      finite_set A -> finite_set B -> A `<=` B = (fset_set A `<=` fset_set B)%fset.
    Proof.
    move=> finA finB; apply/propext; split=> [AB|/fsubsetP AB t].
      by apply/fsubsetP => t; rewrite in_fset_set// in_fset_set// 2!inE => /AB.
    by have := AB t; rewrite !in_fset_set// !inE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_set_set0
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType) (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : finite_set A ->
      fset_set A = fset0 -> A = set0.
    Proof.
    move=> finA; rewrite /fset_set; case: pselect => // {}finA.
    by case: cid => _/= -> ->; rewrite set_fset0.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_set0
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} : fset_set (set0 : set T) = fset0.
    Proof.
    by apply/fsetP=> x; rewrite in_fset_set ?inE//; apply/negP; rewrite inE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_set1
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} (
    x
    Source code
     : T) : fset_set [set x] = [fset x]%fset.
    Proof.
    apply/fsetP=> y; rewrite in_fset_set ?inE//.
    by apply/idP/idP; rewrite inE => /eqP.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_setU
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) :
      finite_set A -> finite_set B ->
      fset_set (A `|` B) = (fset_set A `|` fset_set B)%fset.
    Proof.
    move=> fA fB; apply/fsetP=> x.
    rewrite ?(inE, in_fset_set)//; first by rewrite finite_setU.
    by apply/idP/orP; rewrite ?inE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_setI
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) :
      finite_set A -> finite_set B ->
      fset_set (A `&` B) = (fset_set A `&` fset_set B)%fset.
    Proof.
    move=> fA fB; apply/fsetP=> x.
    rewrite ?(inE, in_fset_set)//; first by apply: finite_setI; left.
    by apply/idP/andP; rewrite ?inE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_setU1
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} (
    x
    Source code
     : T) (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) :
      finite_set A -> fset_set (x |` A) = (x |` fset_set A)%fset.
    Proof.
    by move=> fA; rewrite fset_setU// fset_set1. Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_setD
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) :
      finite_set A -> finite_set B ->
      fset_set (A `\` B) = (fset_set A `\` fset_set B)%fset.
    Proof.
    move=> fA fB; apply/fsetP=> x.
    rewrite ?(inE, in_fset_set)//; first exact: finite_setD.
    by apply/idP/andP; rewrite ?inE => -[]; rewrite ?notin_setE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    super_bij
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     (
    X
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    Y
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set U) (
    f
    Source code
     : {bij X >-> Y}) :
      X `<=` A -> Y `<=` B -> A `\` X #= B `\` Y ->
      exists
    g
    Source code
     : {bij A >-> B}, {in X, g =1 f}.
    Proof.
    elim/Ppointed: U => U in Y B f *.
      rewrite !emptyE in f * => XA _; rewrite setD_eq0 => AX.
      by suff /seteqP->// : A `<=>` X by exists f.
    move=> XA YB /pcard_eqP[g].
    rewrite -(joinIB X A) -(joinIB Y B) !meetEset.
    have /disj_set2P AX : (A `&` X) `&` (A `\` X) = set0 by apply: meetIB.
    have /disj_set2P BY : (B `&` Y) `&` (B `\` Y) = set0 by apply: meetIB.
    rewrite !(setIidr XA) !(setIidr YB) in AX BY *.
    by exists [bij of glue AX BY f g] => x /= xX; rewrite glue1.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    card_eq_fsetP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} {
    A
    Source code
     : {fset T}} {
    n
    Source code
    } :

      rewrite -{1}[A]set_fsetK !emptyE fset_set0 cardfs0.
      by apply: (iffP eqP) => [/IIn_eq0->//|<-]; rewrite II0.
    rewrite (card_eqr card_II) card_eq_sym.
    apply: (iffP pcard_eqP) => [[f]|]; last first.
      rewrite cardfE => eqAn.
      by squash (set_val \o finset_val \o enum_val \o cast_ord (esym eqAn)).
    suff -> : A = [fset f i |
    i
    Source code
     in 'I_n]%fset by rewrite card_imfset ?size_enum_ord.
    apply/fsetP => x; apply/idP/imfsetP => /= [xA|[i _ ->]].
      by have [i _ <-] := 'surj_f xA; exists i.
    by have /(_ i I) := 'funS_f.
    Qed.

     : choiceType} (

     {

     : choiceType} (
    A
    Source code
     : set T)
    n

     :
      infinite_set A ->
        exists2
    B
    Source code
     : {fset T}, [set` B] `<=` A & (#|` B| >= n)%N.

    elim/choicePpointed: T => T in A *; first by rewrite emptyE.
    move=> /infiniteP/ppcard_leP[f]; exists (fset_set [set f i |
    i

     in `I_n]).
      rewrite fset_setK//; first exact: finite_image.
      by apply: subset_trans (fun_image_sub f); apply: image_subset.
    rewrite fset_set_image// card_imfset//= fset_set_II/=.

    Lemma
    infinite_set_fsetP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) :
      infinite_set A <->
       forall
    n
    Source code
    , exists2
    B
    Source code
     : {fset T}, [set` B] `<=` A & (#|` B| >= n)%N.
    Proof.
    split; first by move=> ? ?; apply: infinite_set_fset.
    elim/choicePpointed: T => T in A *.
      move=> /(_ 1%N)[B _]; rewrite cardfs_gt0 => /fset0Pn[x xB].
      by have: [set` B] x by []; rewrite emptyE.
    move=> Bge /finite_setP[n An]; have [B BA] := Bge n.+1.
    apply/negP; rewrite -leqNgt -(card_fset_set An) fsubset_leq_card//.
    apply/fsubsetP => x /BA; rewrite in_fset_set ?inE//.

    Lemma
    fcard_eq
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    T'
    Source code
     : choiceType} (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    B
    Source code
     : set T') :
        finite_set A -> finite_set B ->
      reflect (#|`fset_set A| = #|`fset_set B|) (A #= B).
    Proof.
    move=> /finite_setP/cid[n An] /finite_setP/cid[m Bm].

    by rewrite (card_eql An) (card_eqr Bm); apply: card_eq_II.

    Lemma
    card_IID
    Source code
     {
    n
    Source code
    k
    Source code
    } : `I_n `\` `I_k #= `I_(n - k)%N.
    Proof.
    apply/fcard_eq => //; first exact: finite_setD.
    rewrite fset_setD//= cardfsD/= -fset_setI// setI_II.
    rewrite !fset_set_II !card_imfset// /= !size_enum_ord.
    by case: leqP; rewrite // subnn => /eqP->.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    finite_set_bij
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T)
    n
    Source code
    S
    Source code
     : A != set0 ->
        A #= `I_n -> S `<=` A ->
      exists (
    f
    Source code
     : {bij `I_n >-> A})
    k
    Source code
    , (k <= n)%N /\ `I_n `&` (f @^-1` S) = `I_k.
    Proof.
    elim/Ppointed: T => T in A S *; first by rewrite !emptyE eqxx.
    move=> AN0 An SA; have [k kn Sk] : exists2
    k
    Source code
    , (k <= n)%N & S #= `I_k.
      have /finite_setP[k Sk]: finite_set S by apply: sub_finite_set SA _; exists n.
      exists k => //; rewrite -card_le_II.
      by rewrite -(card_le_eqr An) -(card_le_eql Sk); apply: subset_card_le.
    have /card_esym/ppcard_eqP[f] := Sk.
    have eqAS : A `\` S #= `I_n `\` `I_k.
      have An' := An; have Sk' := Sk.
      do [have /finite_fsetP[{An'}A ->] : finite_set A by exists n] in An AN0 SA *.
      do [have /finite_fsetP[{Sk'}S ->] : finite_set S by exists k] in Sk f SA *.
      have [/card_eq_fsetP {}An /card_eq_fsetP {}Sk] := (An, Sk).
      rewrite -set_fsetD (card_eqr card_IID); apply/card_eq_fsetP.
      by rewrite cardfsD (fsetIidPr _) ?An ?Sk //; apply/fsubsetP.
    case: (super_bij [bij of f^-1] SA _ eqAS) => [x /= /leq_trans->// | g].
    have [{}g ->] := pPbij 'bij_g => /= gE.
    exists [bij of g^-1], k; split=> //=; rewrite -inv_sub_image //= invV.
    by under eq_imagel do rewrite /= gE ?inE//; rewrite image_eq.
    Qed.

    #[deprecated(note="use countable0 instead")]

     := countable0 (only parsing).

    Lemma
    eq_card_nat
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T):
      countable A -> ~ finite_set A -> A #= [set: nat].
    Proof.
    by move=> Acnt /infiniteP leNA; rewrite card_eq_le leNA andbT. Qed.

    Lemma
    infinite_nat
    Source code
     : ~ finite_set [set: nat].
    Proof.
    exact/infiniteP/card_lexx. Qed.

    Lemma
    infinite_prod_nat
    Source code
     : infinite_set [set: nat * nat].
    Proof.
    by rewrite -setXTT; apply: infinite_setX; exact: infinite_nat. Qed.

    Lemma
    card_nat2
    Source code
     : [set: nat * nat] #= [set: nat].
    Proof.
    exact/eq_card_nat/infinite_prod_nat/countableP. Qed.

    Lemma
    injective_gtn
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : nat -> nat) : injective f -> forall (
    n
    Source code
     : nat), exists
    m
    Source code
    , (n < f m)%N.
    Proof.
    move=> fI n; suff [m /negP] : ~` (f @^-1` `I_n.+1) !=set0 by rewrite -ltnNge; exists m.
    apply: infinite_setN0; apply: cofinite_set_infinite; first exact: infinite_nat.
    by rewrite setCK; apply: finite_preimage; first by move=> ? ? ? ?; apply: fI.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    choicePcountable
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType} : countable [set: T] ->
      {
    T'
    Source code
     : countType | T = T' :> Type}.
    Proof.
    move=> /pcard_leP/unsquash f.
    pose TcM := PCanIsCountable (in1TT 'funoK_f).
    pose TC : countType := HB.pack T TcM.
    by exists TC.
    Qed.

      {
    T'
    Source code

    Lemma

    Source code
     {
    I
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    } (
    D
    Source code
     : set I) (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :
        countable D -> (forall
    i
    Source code

    i

     in D) F i).

    rewrite -(eq_countable (card_setT _)) => cD cF; rewrite bigcup_set_type.
    set G := (fun
    i

     : D => F (val i)).

    move: (D : Type) cD G cG => {F I}_ /Pcountable[{}D ->] G cG.
    suff: (\bigcup_
    i
    Source code
     G i #<= [set: {
    i

     & G i}])%card.
      have cGT i : countable [set: G i] by rewrite (eq_countable (card_setT _)).
      have /all_sig[H GE] := fun
    i

     => Pcountable (cGT i).
      by move=> /sub_countable->//; rewrite (eq_fun GE).
    apply/pcard_geP/surjPex; exists (fun (
    k
    Source code
     : {
    i

     & G i}) => val (projT2 k)).
    by move=> x [i _] Gix/=; exists (Tagged G (SigSub (mem_set Gix))).
    Qed.

    T

     (

    k

    Lemma
    eq_cardSP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : Type} (
    A
    Source code
     : set T)
    n
    Source code
     :
      reflect (exists2
    x
    Source code
    , A x & A `\ x #= `I_n) (A #= `I_n.+1).
    Proof.
    elim/Ppointed: T A => T A.
      rewrite !emptyE; apply: (iffP eqP) => [|[]//].
      by move=> /(congr1 (@^~ 0%N))/=; rewrite -falseE ltnS leq0n => /is_true_inj.
    apply: (iffP idP) => [|[x Ax]].
      move=> /ppcard_eqP[f]; exists (f^-1 n); first by apply: funS => /=.
      by apply/card_esym/card_set_bijP; exists f^-1; apply: bij_II_D1.
    move=> /pcard_eqP[f]; have [//|||g _] := @super_bij _ _ _ A _ `I_n.+1 f.
    - by move=> k /=; apply: leq_trans.
    - by rewrite setDD (card_eqr card_IID) subSnn// setIidr ?card_set1// => ? ->.
    - by apply/pcard_eqP; squash g.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    countable_n_subset
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : Type} (
    D
    Source code
     : set T)
    n
    Source code
     :
      countable D -> countable [set
    A
    Source code
     | A `<=` D /\ A #= `I_n].
    Proof.
    move=> Dcnt; elim: n => [|n].
      rewrite [X in countable X]( _ : _ = [set set0])// eqEsubset II0.
      by split=> A /=; [rewrite card_eq0; case=> _ /eqP | move->; split].
    move=> /(countableX Dcnt); apply: sub_countable.
    apply: card_le_trans (card_image_le (fun
    u
    Source code
     => u.1 |` u.2) _).
    apply: subset_card_le => B [BD] /eq_cardSP [x Bx BDx].
    exists (x, B `\ x) => /=; last by apply: setDUK => ? ->.
    by do !split=> //; [exact: BD | apply: subset_trans _ BD; apply: subDsetl].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    countable_finite_subset
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : Type} (
    D
    Source code
     : set T) :
      countable D -> countable [set
    A
    Source code
     | A `<=` D /\ finite_set A ].
    Proof.
    move=> Dcnt; suff -> : [set
    A
    Source code
     | A `<=` D /\ finite_set A ] =
        \bigcup_
    n
    Source code
     [set
    A
    Source code
     | A `<=` D /\ A #= `I_n ].
      by apply: bigcup_countable => // ? _; exact: countable_n_subset.
    rewrite eqEsubset; split=> [A [AD /finite_setP[n An]]|A]; first by exists n.
    by move=> [n _ [AD An]]; split=> //; apply/finite_setP; exists n.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    eq_card_fset_subset
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : pointedType} (
    D
    Source code
     : set T) :
      [set
    A
    Source code
     | A `<=` D /\ finite_set A ] #= [set
    A
    Source code
     : {fset T} | {subset A <= D}] .
    Proof.
    apply/card_set_bijP; exists (@fset_set T); split.
    - by move=> A [AD fsetA] /= x; rewrite in_fset_set // ?inE; exact: AD.
    - by move=> ? ? /set_mem [_ +] /set_mem [_ +]; exact: fset_set_inj.
    - move=> B /= BD; exists [set` B]; rewrite ?set_fsetK //.
      by split; [by move => x /= /BD /set_mem | exact: finite_fset].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fset_subset_countable
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : pointedType} (
    D
    Source code
     : set T) :
      countable D -> countable [set
    A
    Source code
     : {fset T} | {subset A <= D}].
    Proof.
    rewrite -(eq_countable (eq_card_fset_subset _)) => ?.
    exact: countable_finite_subset.
    Qed.

    finite_image_cst
    Source code
     {
    aT
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
     : Type} (
    x
    Source code
     : rT) :
      finite_set (range (cst x : aT -> _)).
    Proof.
    elim/Ppointed: aT => aT; rewrite ?emptyE ?image_set0//.
    suff -> : cst x @` [set: aT] = [set x] by apply: finite_set1.

    Qed.
